category_sources: source_facts.description says lizard is an efficient compressor with very fast decompression.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is lizard; source_facts.homepage is the official inikep/lizard project.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains the project documentation; web result notes a Documentation section on the official repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description describes compression and fast decompression; source_facts.executables lists command-line tools lizardcat and unlizard.
